  winding_tension_factor: 0.95 # standard compression factor for NMC-811
  tab_type: "traditional" # traditional tabs suitable for EV traction cells

electrochemistry:
  cathode:
    material_name: "NMC-811"
    loading_mg_cm2: 22.5 # slightly higher than typical to achieve competitive capacity
    rev_spec_capacity_mahg: 200.0 # standard reversible capacity for NMC-811
    collector_thickness_um: 12.0 # moderate thickness for good conductivity and safety
    coating_thickness_0pct_um: 60.0 # standard coating thickness at 0% SoC
    coating_thickness_100pct_um: 62.0 # slightly higher coating thickness at 100% SoC to ensure safety

    rev_spec_capacity_mahg: 355.0 # standard reversible capacity for graphite anodes
    collector_thickness_um: 8.0 # moderate thickness for good conductivity and safety
    coating_thickness_0pct_um: 85.0 # standard coating thickness at 0% SoC
    coating_thickness_100pct_um: 90.0 # slightly higher coating thickness at 100% SoC to ensure safety
    porosity_pct: 32.0 # moderate porosity for good conductivity and capacity
    np_ratio: 1.12 # standard N/P ratio for EV traction cells

    material_name: "Ceramic-coated PE"
    thickness_um: 12.0 # moderate thickness for good safety and performance
    porosity_pct: 42.0 # moderate porosity for good conductivity and capacity
    areal_weight_mgcm2: 1.0 # standard areal weight for ceramic-coated PE separators

  electrolyte:
    material_name: "LiPF6 in EC:EMC"
    density_g_cm3: 1.22 # standard density for LiPF6 in EC:EMC
    excess_factor: 1.05 # moderate excess factor to ensure safety and performance

housing:

  bottom_insulator_mass_g: 0.1 # minimal bottom insulator mass to ensure low weight and high power density
